quote: Net loss was $12.6 million for the first quarter of 2026 compared to net income of $1.9 million for the first quarter of 2025, a decline of $14.5 million. Diluted loss per share was $0.05 for the first quarter of 2026, down $0.06, compared to diluted earnings per share of $0.01 for the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted EBITDA of $111.3 million increased $15.1 million or 16% (15% in local currency) from the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted diluted earnings per share of $0.15 was up $0.06 or 67% from the first quarter of 2025.
